title: Smoky Smoked Nut Crumble
description: A crispy and savory snack featuring a shortcrust pastry base with smoked flavors, perfect for a monsoon climate or as an afternoon treat.

ingredients.name: Smoked Salted Caramel Flavored Condensed Milk

instructions: Mix Shortcrust Pastry Dough with Smoked Salted Caramel Flavored Condensed Milk until just combined.
Fold in Dried Banana Shreds, Chopped Smoked Almonds, and a pinch of Smoked Paprika Powder.
Press mixture into an 8-inch square baking dish.
Garnish top with Peanut Butter Chips.
Bake for about 20 minutes or until golden brown.
Remove from oven and let cool slightly before serving.
